title: Phyllorkis gracilis

The genus Phyllorkis is often included in the larger genus Dendrobium, but some sources still recognize it as a distinct genus. The exact classification of Phyllorkis gracilis may vary depending on the source, but it is generally accepted as a member of the Orchidaceae family. intro: Phyllorkis gracilis, also known as the 'Slender Leafed Ghost Orchid', is a rare and endangered epiphytic orchid species native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions.
